International Exchange Programs

Erasmus Programme

Incoming Students

MENU

Dear Student,

Thank you for choosing Okan University for your exchange programme. We will make sure that you return to your country with lots of good memories.

Please start getting to know us by taking a virtual tour inside our university

Okan University, in order to make students feel at home from the very first day of their arrival, implements a "buddy" system. Each incoming student is assigned a student mentor or a "buddy" at Okan who will accompany the student in the process of exchange. As soon as you send your application and are accepted by the related department, we will send you information about your "buddy" by email.

Welcome to Okan...

Click to view our Facebook page

Residence Permit

Within one month of a student’s arrival in Turkey, international students must obtain a residence permit. To obtain a residence permit, students need the following documents:

Online application form

E-ikamet

Health insurance

Passport copy with an arrival stamp on it

Forms obtained from the International Programs Office

Tax number from the Tax Office in Turkey with an official receipt
